ksa_text: Ability to design organizational risk management frameworks, governance structures, policies, and procedures that operationalize risk management strategy.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Organizational teams are committed to a culture that considers and communicates AI risk.

top_anchors.element_label: Organizational teams are committed to a culture that considers and communicates AI risk.
Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RM-A-003 (RM, Ability) maps to Bioinformatics Technician scope as weak fit. Composite score 0.5480 clears the weak fit threshold of 0.52. Top framework anchors: nist_ai_rmf=0.548, eu_ai_act=0.482, ddat=0.420. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within bioinformatics analysis, genomic data processing, and life sciences analytics.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: weak fit domain KSA RM-A-003 with composite 0.5480 was preliminarily included, but the KSA text contains no direct analytics-domain signals. Internal consistency requires this to be re-examined against ANL scope.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.rebuttal: Composite 0.5480 above the weak_fit threshold of 0.52 but absence of analytics terminology in the RM domain text means the signal is framework-incidental rather than role-specific. Exclusion is more internally consistent with ANL scope definition.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include overturned. RM domain KSA with no analytics text signals at composite 0.5480 does not survive internal consistency review. Revised to exclude.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does RM-domain KSA RM-A-003 (composite 0.5480) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: RM domain content (AI governance, security/privacy, risk management, compliance) is not a primary expectation in IC-to-senior-IC ANL roles per COSO ERM framework; risk competencies in IC ANL scope limited to data risk identification, not enterprise risk management. Composite 0.5480 confirms weak signal. Exclusion consistent with published ANL frameworks.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms RM domain KSA at composite 0.5480 is not a standard requirement for Bioinformatics Technician at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P3 internal consistency. Final decision: exclude. Composite 0.5480, domain RM. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
